variants.name: radio-basic
variants.description: Radio indicator with a simple label only. No description text. Most compact layout.

variants.name: radio+description
variants.description: Radio indicator with label and a secondary description line below. No container border.

variants.name: radio-boxed
variants.description: Radio indicator with label and description, enclosed in a bordered card container. Border changes to primary color when checked.

states.name: unchecked
states.description: Default state. Radio ring is empty. Container border (boxed variant) uses --layout/border.

states.name: checked
states.description: Selected state. Radio indicator fills with --main-colors/primary. In radio-boxed, the container border also changes to --main-colors/primary.

sizes.name: default
sizes.note: Single size only. No size variants confirmed.

radio-indicator.description: 24×24px circular selection control. Based on the _base-radio sub-component. Renders as empty ring (unchecked) or filled primary circle (checked).

description.description: Secondary clarifying text below the label. Regular, 14px, --text/placeholder.

card-container.description: Bordered card wrapper with drop shadow and rounded corners. Border changes to primary color when checked.

baseComponents.name: _base-radio
baseComponents.description: The radio circle indicator. Renders unchecked (empty ring) or checked (filled primary circle) state.

baseComponents.name: _base-label-checkbox
baseComponents.description: The text container. Supports two internal modes: basic (label only) and label+desc (label with description below).
